---
title: "Hi, I'm Bansi Khachar"
---

::::: {.columns style="display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 2rem;"}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/IMG_7286%202-2.jpg){.rounded-circle style="border-radius: 60%; width: 150px; height: 160px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 0.25rem;"}
From funnel analysis to geofencing attribution, I bring together data, strategy, and curiosity to build marketing that actually connects with people.
:::
:::::

## About Me

I’ve always been more interested in the why behind the numbers than the numbers themselves—what makes people click, leave, or convert. That curiosity is what drew me into marketing analytics and still drives me today.

Originally from Ahmedabad, India, I studied business and marketing before moving to California to pursue an MS in Digital Marketing and Analytics at Cal Poly Pomona. That journey across cultures shaped how I understand consumer behavior in ways data alone can’t.

Today, I work at the intersection of data and human behavior—analyzing funnels, building attribution models, and designing surveys to uncover not just what’s happening, but why—and what to do next.

Outside of work, I love traveling and exploring new places. It’s a constant reminder that behind every data point is a real person with a unique perspective—and that’s what great marketing is built on.

## Let's Connect

Good work starts with good conversations. Let's have one.

You can [email me](mailto:bansikhachar@gmail.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bansikhachar29/).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
